content: Motion (formerly Framer Motion) is now imported from 'motion/react' (not 'framer-motion'). v12 is current. Features: OKLCH color support, hardware-accelerated scroll animations, layoutAnchor prop, axis-locked layout animations. 30M+ downloads/month. Used by Framer and Figma. API unchanged from Framer Motion — same <motion.div> components, same animation props.
